programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: While Bob and Midge (Don Stark, Tanya Roberts) renew their wedding vows, Donna and Eric (Laura Prepon, Topher Grace) take their relationship to a new level. Maud Adams, Barbara Carrera, Kristina Wayborn and Tommy Chong guest star.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: When a disenchanted Donna tells Jackie about her "first time," Eric hears about it through the grapevine.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim is Tarzan in Jill's fantasy; Ilene shares her sensuous dream with Al.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: It's one problem after another when Tim and Al go ice fishing.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When Jill's (Patricia Richardson) retired father (M. Emmet Walsh) arrives for a visit, the house is transformed into a small military base.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) decides to separate Randy and Brad (Jonathan Taylor Thomas, Zachery Ty Bryan) when their arguing becomes too loud for his liking.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob must gain the confidence to fight for Abishola when she goes on another date with Chukwuemeka; Uncle Tunde finds an unlikely friend in Dottie in the aftermath of his fight with Auntie Olu.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob lets Dele get a new haircut and finds himself caught between an irate Abishola and a surprisingly stubborn Dele; Dottie runs into difficulties with the MaxDot board of directors.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Cheryl decides to remodel the bathroom, Jim insists that it include a stainless-steel toilet that talks.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jim to put the kids' artwork in storage, but he disposes of it elsewhere, thinking Cheryl will not notice.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa come home early from their anniversary celebration and find Mandy was planning a party -- complete with beer and underage guests; Kristen feels nervous about her upcoming wedding.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy lands her dream internship with a top fashion designer in New York -- but then unexpectedly turns it down; Vanessa and Mike want to know what changed her mind.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: During the grand opening of The Outdoor Man Grill, Kristin feels like Ed is undermining her role as manager; Eve tries to distance herself from a childhood friend who appears to have a crush on her.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Vanessa sets Eve up with a student -- not realizing that Eve may already be dating someone; Chuck and Mike think Eve is seeing Chuck's son.

programme.desc: Claudia becomes addicted to cigarettes following a stressful day at work.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.sub-title: I Saw Daddy Hitting Santa Claus
programme.desc: Playing Santa at the Christmas fair, Walt promises Henry an expensive toy, infuriating Sean and Claudia.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Andy decides to learn how to dance for his sister's wedding, he turns to Jim -- a closet dancer -- for lessons.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: In order to avoid going to an opera with Cheryl, Jim asks an elderly widower to be her escort.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is dismayed when he has to drive Gracie to spelling bee tournaments all over the state.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is shocked to learn that his recently deceased friend will be buried with a rare baseball card he stole from Jim.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim pulls a groin muscle and tries to keep it a secret from Jill.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim invites the guys over to help him install an engine, but Jill turns the afternoon into a barbecue party.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Al (Richard Karn) helps Tim and Jill (Tim Allen, Patricia Richardson) build a haunted house as part of a Halloween party for Brad (Zachery Ty Bryan).

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim moves in with Al for the night to avoid catching Mark's chickenpox when the Andretti brothers visit the show.

programme.title: Last Man Standing

programme.desc: Vanessa "helps" Mandy and Kyle look for their first apartment; Mike is thrilled when Ryan's good business decisions have him unknowingly embracing capitalism.

programme.desc: When Red takes the Vista Cruiser away from Eric, the guys are grounded until Kelso borrows his cousin's car.
